title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入尼泊尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入尼泊爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Nepal NBSM conformity assessment requirements, NEA grid-connection requirements, AEPC off-grid and mini-grid program standards, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, UN 38.3 transport requirements for the landlocked Nepal routing via India or China border crossings, and Nepal's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与尼泊尔NBSM合格评定要求、NEA并网要求、AEPC离网和微电网项目标准、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、内陆国尼泊尔经印度或中尼口岸路线的UN 38.3运输要求及尼泊尔230/400 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與尼泊爾NBSM合格評定要求、NEA併網要求、AEPC離網和微電網項目標準、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、內陸國尼泊爾經印度或中尼口岸路線的UN 38.3運輸要求及尼泊爾230/400 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NBSM conformity scope determination, NEA grid-connection approval, AEPC program eligibility determination, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Nepal NBSM Technical Standards, NEA grid-connection technical requirements, AEPC program specifications, UN transport regulations, and applicable routing requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NBSM合格评定范围裁定、NEA并网批准、AEPC项目资格认定、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行尼泊尔NBSM技术标准、NEA并网技术要求、AEPC项目规格、UN运输法规及适用路线要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NBSM合格評定範圍裁定、NEA併網批准、AEPC項目資格認定、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行尼泊爾NBSM技術標準、NEA併網技術要求、AEPC項目規格、UN運輸法規及適用路線要求。

answer_first.en: Nepal's BESS regulatory framework is emerging. NBSM (Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology) is the national standards and conformity assessment authority and adopts IEC standards for import approval; NEA (Nepal Electricity Authority) governs grid connection; and AEPC (Alternative Energy Promotion Centre) administers off-grid and mini-grid programs with their own technical specifications. Nepal's hydro-dominant grid faces seasonal variability — dry-season deficits and wet-season surplus — making grid-scale storage relevant for balancing, while rural electrification through AEPC-supported mini-grids drives off-grid storage demand. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Nepal are: (1) NBSM conformity assessment — Nepal adopts IEC standards and Chinese GB/T certificates are not accepted as equivalent; (2) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the international baseline expected by project specifications; (3) NEA grid-connection approval, with PCS requiring configuration for Nepal's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid versus China's 220/380 V; (4) AEPC technical standards for subsidised off-grid and mini-grid program equipment; (5) UN 38.3 transport documentation with landlocked Nepal routing complexity — shipments transit via India (Kolkata or Visakhapatnam port corridors) or the China–Nepal border crossings (Kerung/Tatopani), each with distinct logistics and documentation requirements; and (6) fire and installation approvals from local building and fire authorities. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in Nepal authority or project review.
answer_first.zh: 尼泊尔的BESS监管框架正在形成中。NBSM（尼泊尔标准与计量局）是全国标准和合格评定主管机关，采用IEC标准进行进口审批；NEA（尼泊尔电力局）负责管理并网；AEPC（替代能源推广中心）负责管理离网和微电网项目并设有专属技术规格。尼泊尔以水电为主的电网面临季节性波动——旱季电力短缺、雨季电力过剩——使电网级储能在电网调峰方面具有重要意义，而通过AEPC支持的微电网推进农村电气化则带动了离网储能需求。中国BESS出口尼泊尔的实际差距包括：（1）NBSM合格评定——尼泊尔采用IEC标准，中国GB/T证书不被接受为等效依据；（2）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为项目规格预期的国际基准；（3）NEA并网批准，储能变流器须针对尼泊尔230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行配置，而非中国的220/380 V；（4）AEPC对补贴性离网和微电网项目设备的技术标准；（5）UN 38.3运输文件，涉及内陆国尼泊尔复杂的路线选择——货物须经由印度（加尔各答或维沙卡帕特南港口走廊）或中尼边境口岸（吉隆/樟木）过境，各有不同的物流和文件要求；（6）地方建筑和消防主管机关的消防和安装审批。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是生产基准，但在尼泊尔主管机关或项目审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 尼泊爾的BESS監管框架正在形成中。NBSM（尼泊爾標準與計量局）是全國標準和合格評定主管機關，採用IEC標準進行進口審批；NEA（尼泊爾電力局）負責管理併網；AEPC（替代能源推廣中心）負責管理離網和微電網項目並設有專屬技術規格。尼泊爾以水電為主的電網面臨季節性波動——旱季電力短缺、雨季電力過剩——使電網級儲能在電網調峰方面具有重要意義，而通過AEPC支持的微電網推進農村電氣化則帶動了離網儲能需求。中國BESS出口尼泊爾的實際差距包括：（1）NBSM合格評定——尼泊爾採用IEC標準，中國GB/T證書不被接受為等效依據；（2）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為項目規格預期的國際基準；（3）NEA併網批准，儲能變流器須針對尼泊爾230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行配置，而非中國的220/380 V；（4）AEPC對補貼性離網和微電網項目設備的技術標準；（5）UN 38.3運輸文件，涉及內陸國尼泊爾複雜的路線選擇——貨物須經由印度（加爾各答或維沙卡帕特南港口走廊）或中尼邊境口岸（吉隆/樟木）過境，各有不同的物流和文件要求；（6）地方建築和消防主管機關的消防和安裝審批。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是製造基準，但在尼泊爾主管機關或項目審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
